# ZunoScroll — AI-Powered Micro-Learning & RSS

> ZunoScroll is a personalized, AI-generated micro-learning mobile app that transforms mindless scrolling into productive growth.
> Core keywords: Learn, RSS, AI, micro-learning, bite-sized, smart scroll, upskill, anti-doomscroll, personalized learning path, learn handsfree, learn anything, learn anywhere, adaptive learning.

## What is ZunoScroll?

ZunoScroll turns doom-scrolling into intentional micro-learning. Users create "Views" — topic-focused learning environments — powered by an adaptive AI engine that generates bite-sized lessons and surfaces live RSS feeds relevant to each topic.

## Core Features

- **AI-generated micro-learning**: Short, structured lessons generated by AI and tailored to the user's current knowledge level.
- **Personalized learning path**: An adaptive Learning Graph that infers goals, structures topics logically, identifies foundational concepts, and continuously refines progression.
- **Learn screen**: AI lessons, audio mode (learn handsfree), auto-scroll (smart scroll), revision, and saved posts — all in one screen.
- **Feed screen (RSS)**: Each View includes a real-time RSS feed of news, blogs, and industry updates relevant to the learning topic.
- **Anti-doomscroll**: Replaces addictive, low-value scrolling with meaningful, productive microlearning.
- **Learn anything, learn anywhere**: Unlimited Views covering any topic — technology, finance, health, philosophy, machine learning, and more.
- **Upskill on the go**: Mobile-first design with hands-free audio and auto-scroll so users can upskill while commuting or exercising.
- **Adaptive learning**: The app adapts lessons to the user's progress, ensuring optimal depth and pacing.

## Target Users

People who want to learn new skills, upskill professionally, or stay updated with the world — without committing to long courses. Ideal for lifelong learners, career-switchers, students, and anyone looking to replace doomscrolling with productive screen time.

## Technology

- AI-powered content generation and learning graph construction
- RSS feed aggregation per learning topic
- Spaced repetition for smart revision
- Knowledge graph visualization
